_seed_note: n_trials passed to deflated-Sharpe = global_trial_seed + cumulative_hypotheses_tested. Seed=100 accounts for the repo's prior Direction-A families (GEX 42-cell preg, FibLV/DEX/gap/microstructure/EMA sweeps, 4-LLM rounds) so deflation pays for everything already looked at.
engine: research/signal_bt.py (Layer-1, underlying daily). Layer-2 option translation = research/option_translate.py (TODO, ThetaData NBBO ask-in/bid-out).

data_reality.deep_daily: QQQ OHLCV 1999-2026; 40 single-name OHLC (IPO-dependent); SPY close-only 1993-2026. Supports multi-year/multi-regime/cross-section rigor.
data_reality.regime_proxy: per-instrument 20d realized-vol terciles + 200SMA trend (no VIX parquet). VIX overlay = known_unknown.
data_reality.option_fills_shallow: chains_ytd_2026.db = Jan-Jun 2026 (ONE regime); intraday SPY/QQQ 160d. Cannot do multi-year option-level robustness; Layer-2 = recent-occurrence ThetaData NBBO sample only.
data_reality.constraint: Spec criteria 'edge in >=2 of 3 calendar years' + '>=3 of 5 regimes' are satisfiable at LAYER 1 (underlying) only. C (options-structure) and F (intraday 0-3DTE) are data-thin -> flagged, tested narrowly or deferred.

known_unknowns: VIX/term-structure regime overlay (only realized-vol proxy today)
FOMC/CPI/macro-event calendars not cached -> D-category event-drift signals blocked
No bonds/dollar/credit series -> true cross-asset (E) limited to equity-panel internals
Layer-2 option translation engine not built yet (slippage/IV-crush kill-test pending)
C-category (IV skew/term/put-call) untestable on deep history; only 6mo chains_ytd

Layer-2 robustness: high NBBO-skip on ATM weekly strikes (~55-60%). FIX before trusting any economic verdict: prefer monthly expiries, widen strike tolerance, raise n to full population or a large representative sample, add bootstrap CI on mean option P&L + edge-vs-control, consider Grok's regime-portfolio P&L attribution for overlapping holds.

hypotheses.failure: capitulation bounce is noise; dips slightly continue down cross-sectionally (breadth 0.32)
realized-vol backwardation bounce: CI includes 0, perm_p 0.45, breadth 0.46

skeptic: IS the momentum factor (Jegadeesh-Titman) — not novel
fires 30% of days = a long/beta REGIME filter, not a discrete setup; 64.8% win sits on 59.9% drift base
OOS Sharpe 2.618 OVERSTATED: 10d holds entered daily overlap ~90%, trade-independence violated
+0.36pp/10d magnitude almost surely too small to beat option premium+theta -> predict Layer-2 REJECT for naive long calls
hypotheses.next: Layer-2: ThetaData 10d ATM/OTM call P&L on a sample of entries, ask-in/bid-out

layer2.powered: n=50-69 valid, retention 0.85-0.87, frac_monthly 1.0 (monthly-preference fixed the old 55-60% NBBO skip)
layer2.ci_signal_mean_pnl: positive (~[+1.3,+33]) -- long calls in a 2018-26 bull make money in absolute terms
layer2.ci_edge_vs_random: INCLUDES 0 at BOTH n=60 [-27.4,+21.9] and n=80 [-2.1,+37.6] -- NO timing edge over random long calls
layer2.stability: verdict = REJECT at BOTH samples (old engine flipped PASS/REJECT). Point estimate still noisy (-2.4 vs +17.7) but the CI-based verdict is stable -- that is the fix.
layer2.mono_regime_block: 100% trend_up -> hard PASS-blocker fires independently (edge is regime-conditional, can't be certified robust)
layer2.conclusion: STABLE REJECT. Option gains are bull-market beta; no edge over random; regime-conditional. This RESOLVES the earlier INCONCLUSIVE -- the hardened engine reaches a powered sample and the CI gives a stable verdict.
layer2.regime_conditioned: REJECT confirmed under FAIRER test: B1 does not beat same-regime (trend_up) random either -- ci_edge_vs_regime_random [-23.0,+23.8] includes 0. B1 IS the regime (be long in uptrends); no within-regime edge. Most honest possible verdict.

hypotheses.disposition: PARKED: Layer-1 = year-concentrated mono-regime beta (not a discrete edge); Layer-2 = inconclusive at attainable power. Re-test DEPRIORITIZED until Layer-2 hardened (bootstrap CI + monthly-expiry skip fix). Not a queue priority.

hypotheses.failure: 52wk-low up-day reclaim: perm_p 0.60, CI includes 0, breadth 0.59
turn-of-month anomaly DECAYED on QQQ: lift ~0, perm_p 0.90 (consistent with post-publication decay)
OPEX-week Mon->Fri: QQQ null; faint +0.25pp single-name tilt but 0% individually significant -> noise
vol-collapse relief rally is null (lift slightly negative, perm_p 0.36)
low-vol+uptrend melt-up FALSE: always-on (n=2291) pure beta, lift ~0 negative; breadth 0.41
vol-expansion downtrend SHORT: positive-ish lift but perm_p 0.58 (noise), degenerate OOS

FALSIFIED LONG: extreme rv20 (>90th pct) -> CONTINUED DECLINE -0.43pp/10d, perm_p 0.007 SIGNIFICANT. Vol-clustering/crash-continuation, not bounce. Symmetric short = widow-maker (A5 downtrend-short null), NOT promoted
breadth>0.70 continuation null: always-on (n=3405) beta, lift ~0, perm_p 0.82
breadth<0.25 washout bounce null (perm_p 0.54)
semis leadership marginally positive (+0.15pp, perm_p 0.14) but fails year-consistency (0.52) + OOS -> not robust
QQQ/SPY RS top-tercile null: lift negative, regimes 2/5, years 0.52, DSR fails

NEAR-MISS: perm_p 0.011, +0.33pp/5d, OOS 0.78, breadth 0.64 all PASS -- but fails years_pos (0.59) AND is mono-regime trend_up by construction (close>200SMA) = B1's beta cousin. Skeptic: LIKELY_BETA_OR_ARTIFACT. NOT promoted; year-gate+skeptic both caught it
momentum acceleration null/negative (lift -0.14pp, perm_p 0.23, breadth 0.41)
calm+broad continuation null: always-on (n=1953) beta, lift ~0, perm_p 0.92
LONE Wave-3 survivor (looser gate) -> Layer-2 REJECT. See layer2 block.

layer2.ci_edge_REGIME_random: [-14.6,40.7] incl 0 -> does NOT beat random high-vol entries; low-breadth adds nothing beyond 'stress'
layer2.per_year: works in V-bottoms (2019+64,2020+60,2025+85) but LOSES in sustained 2022 bear (-15.5% n=24, largest cell); +mean leans on 2026 +199% n=2
layer2.read: vol BETA + V-bottom survivorship + outlier-driven. The regime-conditioned path correctly engaged (mono vol_high) and rejected. First real-signal exercise of PASS_REGIME_CONDITIONAL machinery -> worked.

hypotheses.failure: confirmed-thrust null: perm_p 0.52, degenerate OOS
semis-lead+calm: perm_p 0.114 (>0.05), fails years_pos + deflated_sharpe (0.18). Marginal, not robust
short falsified-ish: lift wrong-direction, perm_p 0.059, oos_sharpe -0.90
RS-acceleration null: always-on (n=2279) beta, lift ~0, perm_p 0.90
B3 + vol filter = STILL trend beta. Only fails years_pos; mono-trend by construction (close>200SMA); skeptic LIKELY_BETA. Same family as B1/B3. Not promoted.
short null: perm_p 0.78, lift ~0
short SIGNIFICANTLY WRONG-direction (perm_p 0.033): when semis AND tech both lag, QQQ BOUNCES next 5d (contrarian mean-reversion, not a short edge). Catching-falling-knives = dangerous; NOT promoted.
bearish breadth-divergence null: perm_p 0.57

Pre-FOMC drift (Lucca-Moench) REJECTED in modern era. Positive + market-wide (breadth 0.85) but NOT significant 2011-2026 (CI incl 0). Clean DECAY replication: strong 2011-2015 (+16 to +74bps), faded/reversed post-2015 publication (2018 -46bps), 2022 resurgence (+47/+91, hiking cycle). No Layer-2 (rejected + magnitude can't clear 1d ATM premium).

validated_edges.name: FibLV EMA100 +2sigma break -> 5d band (UP only)
validated_edges.key: +3.7pp vs distance-matched, 95% CI [+0.1,+7.4], p=0.020; split-half robust; DOWN side NULL; 'almost always' is FALSE
validated_edges.caveat: intraday SPY tick; not yet option-translated

validated_edges.name: Opening 30m drive -> same-side close
validated_edges.verdict: VALIDATED as CONTEXT (not a fresh entry)
validated_edges.key: SPY 67.3% [60,75], QQQ 71.1% [64,78], symmetric; 10am move mostly done

rejected_hypotheses.reason: lift +1.3pp CI [-0.2,+2.8] includes 0; distance-matched control kills it; deep-fill = coin flip
Holm-corrected p>0.10 all weekdays since 2021; Mon->Tue only full-history survivor, dead 2021-2026
SURVIVORSHIP only: rides persist (55% vs 17%) but distance-matched fwd lift ~0 (SPY -0.1pp, QQQ -1.5pp)
COINCIDENT not leading: corr(OFI,ret_t)=+0.32 but partial corr(OFI,ret_t+1|ret_t)=-0.009
FLOW_COINCIDENT: contemp corr +0.40 but partial(flow|contemp ret)=+0.004; zero leadership
FALSIFIED: bubble-placebo migration -2.0e-5, one-sided p=0.98; bubbles drift slightly AWAY
WEAKER/complementary: win50 36% vs 57% GEX; keep as shadow parallel only, not a standalone edge

REJECTED by lit control ($7.11 Databento). DP levels 72% coincide with lit volume nodes; DP holds no better than LIT (-1.8pp, CI incl 0). Pilot's +5pp was a PRICE-PATH ARTIFACT (test-day path built from the dark tape itself -> anchored at dark levels). On a clean lit path, neither dark NOR lit levels beat random for S/R. See docs/research/DARKPOOL_SR_FINDINGS.md.

FAILS OOS. n=174 'validation' was single-window April 2026. Jan-Jun re-validation: overall lift +0.49% (day-clustered CI [-0.35,+1.31] incl 0); April lift +0.62% / NON-April +0.01% (zero); Feb/Mar/Jun NEGATIVE (Jun -2.52%, 7% WR). Trend beta like B1 (April +5.78% = 5.16% beta + 0.62% signal). Telegram mute (64.5%->36.4% WR) was correct. Option economics: low-WR (40%), tail-driven, not significant. See docs/research/KING_MIG_OOS_FINDINGS.md.

open_questions: Does vol mean-reversion (panic-bounce) survive once option-translated (IV is highest exactly when the signal fires)?
Cross-sectional 12-1 momentum on the 40-name panel: real or just beta to the AI-megacap run?
Turn-of-month / OPEX-week calendar effects on QQQ post-2015?
ANSWERED (B1): momentum is real-but-beta on the underlying and NEGATIVE-vs-control as long calls. Closed.
session_insights: Two-layer design forced by data: signals discovered on deep underlying (Layer 1), then killed-or-confirmed by realistic option fills on the shallow recent window (Layer 2).
The 40-name cross-section is a stronger overfitting guard than the spec asks for: breadth (frac names with positive lift) must clear 0.65 or a QQQ-only 'edge' is suspect.
Wave 1: 5/6 rejected; the lone Layer-1 pass (B1 momentum) is the momentum FACTOR = beta, queued for Layer-2 where its +0.36pp/10d should die to option premium.
Calendar anomalies (turn-of-month, OPEX week) are DEAD on modern QQQ — clean replication of the post-publication anomaly-decay literature.
Buy-the-panic-dip (A1) is NOT an edge on QQQ/single names: high-vol 2-sigma drops slightly continue down (cross-breadth 0.32).

Layer-2 PROVED its worth on B1: a signal that passed strict Layer-1 made +10.6% on long calls IN ISOLATION but LOST to a random-entry control (+22.8%). The absolute option gains were pure QQQ bull beta; the momentum timing actively hurt. This is the exact failure the two-layer design exists to catch.

METHODOLOGY: Layer-2 economic verdict FLIPPED (REJECT@2018+ vs PASS@2021+) on the same signal due to small-n + 55-60% NBBO-skip. Added engine power-guard (n>=30 AND skip_rate<=0.40 required for a confident verdict). A noisy option-translation is worse than none — it manufactures false PASS/REJECTs.
Wave 2 (10 signals): 0 survivors. E-category (breadth + semis-RS + QQQ/SPY-RS) is COMPREHENSIVELY NULL -- well-known/priced factors; no forward edge on QQQ.

A6 extreme-vol-washout is SIGNIFICANT in the WRONG direction (perm_p 0.007, -0.43pp/10d): extreme rv20 -> continued decline (vol clustering), falsifying 'buy the washout'. The tradeable read (short) is a widow-maker; not promoted.

B3 pullback-in-uptrend was the only near-miss and is B1's structural cousin (mono-regime trend_up, year-concentrated). The years_pos gate AND the adversarial skeptic BOTH flagged it as beta -- the pipeline is catching exactly the false positives raw permutation-significance would wave through.
Always-on signals (A4 n=2291, E1 n=3405) are textbook beta: huge n, lift ~0. High event count != edge.

Layer-2 HARDENED: monthly-expiry preference cut NBBO-skip 55-60%->~13% (retention 0.40->0.87); bootstrap CIs replace point estimates; mono-regime is a hard PASS-blocker. B1 now gives a STABLE REJECT at both n=60 and n=80 (was INCONCLUSIVE/flipping). The CI-based verdict is stable even though the point estimate stays noisy -- exactly the goal.

Guard validated 3 ways: true-negative B1 REJECT (stable 6/6) + true-positive multi-regime oracle PASS + true-positive mono-regime oracle REJECTED-despite-+61pp-edge. The last quantifies the mono-regime block's Type-II cost and is the strongest motivation for regime-conditioned controls.

Regime-conditioned controls SHIPPED + validated: the mono-regime hard block (a Type-II liability that rejected a real +61pp regime-specific edge) is replaced by comparison vs SAME-regime random. Result: B1 still REJECTs (fails even the fairer same-regime test = pure regime beta), locked-oracle now PASS_REGIME_CONDITIONAL. The guard distinguishes regime beta from genuine within-regime edge.
Wave 3 (10 INTERACTION signals): 0 genuine edges. Combining two null/beta conditions (vol x breadth, vol x RS, divergences) does NOT manufacture an edge -- the interaction space is also null on QQQ.

I2 (lone survivor, high-vol+low-breadth washout) -> Layer-2 REJECT: it's vol BETA. Works in V-bottoms (2020,2025) but lost -15.5% across 24 trades in the 2022 bear; does NOT beat random high-vol entries (regime CI [-14.6,+40.7] incl 0). First real-signal test of the regime-conditioned path -> it correctly engaged + rejected.

I9 double-RS-lag SHORT is significantly WRONG-direction (perm_p 0.033): when semis AND tech both lag, QQQ bounces -- a contrarian effect, not a short edge (and a falling-knife trade). Like A6, a significant negative finding.
I7 calm-pullback = B3 + vol filter = STILL trend beta. Adding a vol condition to a trend-beta signal does not de-beta it.

Dark-pool S/R idea: REJECTED. The decisive lit-control ($7) showed DP levels are redundant with lit volume (72% coincide, no better hold), and the suggestive pilot was a price-path artifact (building the test path from the dark tape inflated hold at dark levels). Lesson: the price PATH must be independent of the LEVELS being tested, not just the level-construction being causal. $7 control saved a $30-55 powered pull + a false Telegram feature.

Category D pre-FOMC drift: REJECTED. Faithful replication of POST-PUBLICATION DECAY -- Lucca-Moench strong 2011-2015, faded post-2015, 2022 resurgence (hiking cycle when FOMC was THE driver). Market-wide (breadth 0.85) but not significant on the modern sample. The best non-earnings/no-IV-crush event candidate decayed; Category D looks thin (PEAD=IV crush, ToM=dead, CPI=direction-set-by-10am).

King-migration runner FAILS OOS: the n=174 +4.14% 'validation' was single-window April 2026; Jan-Jun re-validation shows non-April lift = +0.01% (zero), Feb/Mar/Jun negative. It's trend beta (April return = 5.16% beta + 0.62% signal), same family as B1. The user's own telegram mute (failed OOS 64.5->36.4%) was the tell. Execution optimization correctly NOT built on it. LESSON: a single-window 'validation' (even n=174) is not OOS validation; cluster the CI (naive perm over-rejected here because events cluster in one strong-beta month).

EXIT-POLICY = first actionable POSITIVE finding. On fat-tailed OTM-call lottos, MANAGING winners destroys expectancy: hold-to-expiry +57% (CI [19,96] excludes 0, max +966%, 25%>+100%) vs fixed TP+50/+100% NEGATIVE (-12%/-11%, cap the tail). Matches user's real wins (let runners run) + losses (greedy TPs/overleverage). Caveat: April single-window -> magnitude beta-inflated, RANKING robust. Phase 2: cross-regime confirm + SIZING layer (median -100% demands tiny fixed-fraction). doc: docs/research/EXIT_POLICY_FINDINGS.md

EXIT-POLICY PHASE 2 (cross-regime CONFIRMED): 'don't cap winners' holds Jan-Jun (CIs exclude 0), retiring the April single-window caveat. PARTIAL SCALING (sell 1/3 @+100-150%, run rest) is the tradeable rule: keeps ~75% expectancy + full tail, cuts median -58%->-17%. REGIME GATE is the biggest lever (Mar/Apr/May +112/+235/+134 vs Feb/Jun -37/-18; no exit saves down months). This + the engine = the session's durable, positive deliverables. Telegram: refine TP-window alert to scale-1/3 + regime-caution flag.
next_priorities: HARDEN Layer-2 (bootstrap CI + monthly-expiry skip fix) -- still the gating bottleneck; no economic verdict is trustworthy until done.

Categories F (intraday 0-3DTE) and G (combinations) remain at 0 coverage. F needs intraday option data (160d, single-regime -> n-guard risk); G needs >=5 validated bases (have 0). Both DEFERRED with cause.

If continuing Layer-1: the productive frontier is NON-price-derived signals (the price/vol/breadth/RS space is now well-covered and mostly null). Options-structure (C) needs the 6mo chains_ytd or ThetaData IV history; event-drift (D) needs FOMC/CPI calendars (known_unknown).

layer2_resolved.verdict: STABLE REJECT (beta, no edge vs random, mono-regime)

gate_fix: years_pos>=0.60 added to BOTH survivor(v2) and strict evaluate() so VALIDATED is a strict superset of survivor. B1 correctly downgraded VALIDATED->NEEDS_REFINEMENT.

parked_likely_beta.reason: momentum factor = beta; mono-regime trend-up; Layer-2 inconclusive; re-test only after Layer-2 CI/skip hardening

methodology_notes: research/methodology_notes.md — dual controls, power guard, NBBO tail bias, mono-regime trap, year-concentration, gate nesting
layer2_hardening_todo: Overlapping-position P&L attribution (regime-portfolio view) -- the per-trade bootstrap still assumes approx-independence; fine for year-stratified samples, not for dense consecutive entries.
wave3_guidance: BIAS toward INTERACTION/conditional signals (vol x breadth, vol x relative-strength), NOT another pure level/momentum/breadth variant — that space is mined and mostly null
Event-style D ideas once FOMC/CPI calendars are sourced
C options-structure once IV-term/skew history is available (chains_ytd 6mo or ThetaData greeks)
AVOID: more pure momentum, more simple breadth, anything close to the 9 priors / B1-B3 trend-filtered family
layer2_hardening_done: Bootstrap CI on edge_vs_random AND edge_vs_opposite_dir -- DONE
mono_regime now a HARD PASS-blocker; richer regime_diversity reporting -- DONE
Data-access split to theta_options.py + retry-wrapped _get + config block -- DONE

Regime-conditioned controls: mono-regime signals now evaluated vs SAME-regime random (PASS_REGIME_CONDITIONAL) instead of hard-blocked. Resolves the Type-II cost; B1 still REJECTs (no within-regime edge), locked-oracle PASSes.

guard_validation.true_negative_B1: REJECT, STABLE across 6 draws (n=50/60/65/80/80/95); edge_vs_random CI includes 0 every time. Old engine flipped -12/+32/+72.
guard_validation.true_positive_multiregime_oracle: PASS. Lookahead +3% oracle (80% trend_up, spans vol 5/29/15): ci_sig_mean [69,92], ci_edge_random [40,87] both exclude 0; mono-block correctly did NOT fire.
guard_validation.true_positive_monoregime_oracle: RESOLVED by regime-conditioned controls: uptrend-locked +3% oracle now -> LAYER2_PASS_REGIME_CONDITIONAL (ci_edge_vs_regime_random [38.0,76.6] excludes 0). Old hard-block rejected this +61pp real edge; the regime-conditioned control rescues it while STILL rejecting B1 (which fails the same-regime test).
guard_validation.conclusion: Guard validated 4 ways: (1) B1 beta -> REJECT (fails even same-regime test), (2) multi-regime oracle -> PASS, (3) regime-locked oracle -> PASS_REGIME_CONDITIONAL (Type-II cost RESOLVED), (4) underpowered -> INCONCLUSIVE. Regime-conditioned controls replaced the mono-regime hard block: a real within-regime edge survives; regime beta still dies.
test_fixtures: _ORACLE_uptrend_locked_test (deliberate-LOOKAHEAD fixtures, NOT hypotheses; excluded from category_coverage)

exit_findings.summary: DON'T cap winners on OTM lottos; hold-to-expiry or wide trail; size tiny; regime-gate

phase2_crossregime.confirmed: RANKING HOLDS Jan-Jun (not April-only): hold_expiry +72.7% / partial-scale +37-54%, all CIs exclude 0; trailing/fixed-TP lose.
phase2_crossregime.tradeable_rule: PARTIAL SCALING: sell 1/3 at +100-150%, run the rest -> keeps ~75% expectancy + full tail (28%>+100%, +1100% max), cuts median loss -58%->-17%. Or sell 1/2 at +100% for breakeven median + 48% WR.
phase2_crossregime.regime_gate: BIGGEST lever: by-month hold_expiry = Jan+12 Feb-37 Mar+112 Apr+235 May+134 Jun-18. Lottos print in trending-up tape, bleed in chop/down; NO exit saves Feb/Jun. Gating out down/chop > any exit tweak.
phase2_crossregime.telegram: EARNED: refine Mir TP-Window alert -> suggest scale-1/3-at-+100% (not flat TP) for lotto positions; add regime-caution flag in downtrends. Inform discipline, don't hard-gate auto-trade.
phase2_crossregime.phase3: Sizing layer: median still -17% w/ partial-scale + correlated (all fire in up months) -> correlation-capped fractional Kelly + concurrent-exposure cap.
